producers.notes: resource identity — use as name/parent param for .get()

parent.description: Required. The resource name of the project associated with the attestors, in the format `projects/*`.

attestorId.note: Iterate response["attestors"][], extract item["name"] → pass as "attestorId"

resource.description: REQUIRED: The resource for which the policy is being requested. See [Resource names](https://cloud.google.com/apis/desig
